summary: Iteration 61: Manual/Cash Payment Option Testing - All core features verified. Backend API tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI components tested: India Payment page manual mode, Admin India Proofs tab, Receipt Template Attachments section, and Programs Hub Session Links with editable custom labels all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: India Payment page correctly handles mode=manual query param - hides Exly tab and shows proof form directly
Payment method dropdown has all required options: bank_transfer, upi, cash_deposit, cheque, other
Notes textarea field added to proof form and accepted by backend API
Pricing breakdown correctly shows: Base Price - 9% discount + 18% GST (on full base) + 3% platform charges
Admin India Proofs tab shows pending submissions with Pending/Approved/Rejected/All filters
Receipt Template has Attachments section with Upload Document and Add Link buttons
Programs Hub Session Links section has editable custom link label inputs for each program
seed_data_creation: Enabled india_payment_enabled=true, india_exly_link, and india_bank_details in settings for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual payment flow tested successfully. Key data-testids: proof-payment-method (dropdown with 5 options), proof-notes (textarea), india-payment-options (3 payment buttons on enrollment step 4), india-alt-payment-option (Exly/Bank Transfer button), manual-payment-option (Submit Manual Payment button). Admin tabs: India Proofs (shows pending submissions), Receipt Template (has attachments-section with upload-doc-btn and add-link-btn), Upcoming Hub (has session-links-section with custom-label-{program_id} inputs).

india_payment_manual_mode.exly_tab_hidden: PASS - Tab hidden in manual mode
india_payment_manual_mode.payment_method_dropdown: PASS - Has bank_transfer, upi, cash_deposit, cheque, other

session_links_custom_label.custom_label_editable: PASS - Link Name input field per program

tests_executed.name: Submit proof returns 404 for non-existent enrollment
UI: India Payment page manual mode title
UI: Exly tab hidden in manual mode
UI: Payment method dropdown has all options
UI: Pricing breakdown shows all components
UI: Programs Hub Session Links editable

note_on_enrollment_payment_options: The 3 payment options (Stripe, Exly/Bank Transfer, Submit Manual Payment) appear on the enrollment page Step 4 (Pay) only when bookerCountry === 'IN' AND paymentSettings.india_enabled === true. These were verified in code review at EnrollmentPage.jsx lines 659-726. Direct URL testing of /india-payment/:id?mode=manual confirmed the manual payment flow works correctly.
